headline: Five APF2 native physical-likelihood smoke runtime attempts (v1 + repair v1 + repair v2 + repair v3 + repair v4) all ended at EXCEPTION before APF2 monkeypatch could fire; the gate progression A→B→C→A reveals tau as central friction (canonical CAMB name is tau_reio; either keep tau in extra_args under the canonical name, or route tau as a sampled/input parameter through planck_2018_lowl.EE which actually consumes it); G5 of six-gate ladder remains OPEN.

attempts.error: LoggedError("Could not find anything to use input parameter(s) {'tau', 'logA'}.")
attempts.diagnosis: Cobaya dependency graph rejected fixed input parameters {'tau','logA'} before APF2 CAMB injection could occur.

attempts.error: LoggedError("Could not find anything to use input parameter(s) {'tau', 'nnu', 'mnu'}.")
attempts.repair_basis: Cobaya rejected unused tau/logA in v1; this uses logA -> As lambda as in working control MCMC.
attempts.diagnosis: Repair removed logA from unused set via logA->As lambda; Cobaya then rejected {'tau','nnu','mnu'} for the same structural reason.

attempts.error: LoggedError("The following expected sampled parameters (or their aliases) were not found : {'A_planck': ['calPlanck'], 'amp_143x217': [], 'amp_217': [], 'n_217': [], 'calEE': [], 'calTE': [], 'n_143x217': [], 'amp_143': [], 'n_143': []}")
attempts.repair_basis: v1 rejected tau/mnu/nnu as unused graph inputs; v2 removes them from params and supplies fixed constants through CAMB extra_args/defaults.
attempts.diagnosis: v2 cleared the unused-fixed-input gate by moving tau/nnu/mnu to extra_args; Cobaya now rejects at the next gate — Planck likelihoods (NPIPE highl CamSpec + TE/EE calibration) expect sampled nuisance parameters {A_planck/calPlanck, amp_143x217, amp_217, n_217, calEE, calTE, n_143x217, amp_143, n_143} that are not declared in the params block.

attempts.error: LoggedError('Some of the parameters passed to CAMB were not recognized: Unrecognized parameter: tau')
attempts.repair_basis: v2 rejected missing Planck/CamSpec nuisance inputs; v3 adds fixed one-point nuisance values while keeping APF2 coefficients frozen.
attempts.diagnosis: v3 cleared the missing-Planck-nuisance gate by adding fixed values for A_planck/amp_143/etc.; Cobaya Model now builds and reaches logposterior({}); CAMB then rejects 'tau' as an unrecognized parameter name (CAMB expects 'tau_reio' in extra_args, not 'tau'). This is the first attempt to reach Cobaya's compute path — but CAMB's set_params() validation fires before set_dark_energy() executes, so the APF2 monkeypatch still does not fire.

attempts.error: LoggedError("Could not find anything to use input parameter(s) {'tau'}.")
attempts.repair_basis: v3 passed tau through CAMB extra_args and CAMB rejected it; v4 routes tau as an active one-point Cobaya input while keeping mnu/nnu in CAMB extra_args and APF2 coefficients frozen.
attempts.diagnosis: v4 moved tau back to Cobaya params as a one-point input to clear v3's CAMB-side rejection. Cobaya now rejects tau again as unused: no theory or likelihood module consumes 'tau' under the apf2_w2_tabulated parameterization (CAMB consumes 'tau_reio' not 'tau'; planck_2018_lowl.EE would consume 'tau' but its dependency-graph node is not wired through the current YAML). This is Gate A circling back: the route 'tau -> params' fails for the same reason as attempts 1+2. The structural fix is to use canonical CAMB name 'tau_reio' in extra_args (closing both gates simultaneously).

structural_gate_description: Five attempts confirm that tau is the central friction. CAMB rejects 'tau' in extra_args (Gate C, attempt 4) because the canonical CAMB API name is 'tau_reio'. Cobaya rejects 'tau' as a one-point input parameter (Gate A repeated, attempt 5) because no consuming theory/likelihood is wired through the current YAML. The structural fix is either (i) use 'tau_reio' as the canonical name in extra_args, OR (ii) route tau through planck_2018_lowl.EE (which actually consumes the reionization optical depth via its likelihood input list) and ensure the dependency graph connects.

six_gate_ladder_state.G5_native_smoke_physical_likelihood: OPEN — LATEST-86 launch + LATEST-87 five runtime attempts all EXCEPTION at Cobaya/CAMB parameter validation (Gate A→B→C→A progression centered on tau routing); attempt 4 reached Cobaya Model.logposterior() but CAMB rejected 'tau' name; attempt 5 circled back to Gate A by moving tau to params

forbidden_claims: Do not claim APF2 native physical-likelihood smoke PASS.
Do not claim the monkeypatch fired.
empirical_needle_unchanged: LATEST-81 4-of-4 profile-probe ACCEPT at 95% remains the strongest cross-SN reading.
